expected_behavior: Agent activates test-architect skill in gaps mode
Agent searches for coverage reports (coverage.json, lcov.info, etc.)
Agent runs coverage-analyzer.py on the found report
Agent ranks gaps by complexity-weighted risk, not raw line count
Agent prioritizes security/auth code gaps as P0
Agent recommends specific test types (unit/integration/e2e) per gap
Agent renders dashboard if 10+ gaps are found
